age.Description: Age in years at initial study participation.

dataset_group.Description: Dataset or study group from which the participant was drawn.

training_group.Description: Training group for the Younger_Able-Bodied_Controls dataset, where SF indicates supernumerary robotic thumb training and CF indicates piano-training controls.

amputated_side.Description: Side of amputation for amputee participants.

level_of_amputation.Description: Level of upper-limb amputation where applicable.

phantom_limb_sensations.Description: Phantom limb sensation score where available.

phantom_limb_pain.Description: Phantom limb pain score where available.

residual_limb_pain.Description: Residual limb pain score where available.

original_subject_id.Description: Original participant identifier in the source dataset, where available.

phantom_sensation_frequency_last_year.Description: Frequency of phantom limb sensations in the last year, where available.

phantom_pain_frequency_last_year.Description: Frequency of phantom limb pain in the last year, where available.
